/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/prismloader.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libprismloader.so -o libprismloader.so CMakeFiles/prismloader.dir/src/entry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prismloader.dir/src/hookengine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prismloader.dir/src/patternscan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prismloader.dir/src/modloader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prismloader.dir/src/gdinit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/prismloader.dir/src/ui/modmenu.cpp.o
